## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on SEO strategy shift from conditions-focused to treatment-focused content, and address technical SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pivot SEO strategy from conditions hub to treatment-focused content, prioritizing ketamine-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Significant duplicate content issues discovered across city and state pages, requiring urgent cleanup](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Combine video testimonials with reviews page to improve overall performance and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Update and maintain the reviews blog, while monitoring for potential cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from conditions-focused to treatment-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Prioritize ketamine-related topics (75% of effort)](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Build out secondary clusters (e.g., EMDR) to diversify authority](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Integrate broader psychiatry and medication comparisons (e.g., SSRIs vs. ketamine)](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Create a hierarchical structure for treatments, medications, and related content](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Duplicate content discovered across city and state pages](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Old scripted pages competing with newly designed pages](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Need to redirect or consolidate duplicate content](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [Update homepage meta title and description](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)

### Reviews and Testimonials

  - [Combine video testimonials page with main reviews page](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Keep reviews blog but monitor for potential cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Add reviews schema to main reviews page for rich snippets](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
  - [Consider linking out to positive third-party reviews](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)

### Site Structure and Navigation

  - [Refine footer links to reduce crawl budget waste](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Create index pages for treatments and locations](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Update anchor text in footer to be more descriptive (e.g., "Ketamine Treatment in California")](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Map out and clean up duplicate city and state pages (Jakub to prioritize)](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Begin creating ketamine-focused content for immediate publishing](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Noah to provide a table of treatments, medications, and related topics for content mapping](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Akina to combine video testimonials with the main reviews page](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
  - [Update the reviews blog with fresh content (Matt to assist)](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
  - [Noah to update homepage meta title and description](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Continue discussion on Slack for follow-up items and progress updates](https://fathom.video/share/uKmDqbHUeVrxP_K3d8rDrryzB2w8yM2z?tab=summary&timestamp=2930.0)
